description: Core community call discussing the new epoch rewards proposal. Haoran from Solana Labs introduces the proposal aimed at addressing long block times at epoch boundaries, suggesting a new distribution method for rewards over multiple blocks instead of a single block payout.
topic_summary: Discussion on epoch rewards proposal to improve scalability by spreading reward distribution over multiple blocks instead of a single block at epoch boundaries. Key phases include reward calculation and reward distribution, with an estimated 40 seconds for calculation and distribution over M blocks.
